items.title_en: Turkish police order 83 arrests over online praise for school shootings
items.title_zh: 土耳其警方因网上赞扬校园枪击事件而下令逮捕 83 人
items.desc_en: At least nine were killed in a school shooting in southern Turkey on Wednesday, a day after another attack injured 16 people at a high school.
items.desc_zh: 土耳其南部周三发生校园枪击事件，造成至少 9 人死亡，一天前，一所高中又发生一起袭击事件，造成 16 人受伤。

items.title_en: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison
items.title_zh: 南非反对派人物马勒马被判五年监禁
items.desc_en: Malema is appealing against the decision to prevent him from being taken to prison on Thursday.
items.desc_zh: 马勒马正在对周四阻止他入狱的决定提出上诉。

items.title_en: EasyJet's stock drops as the Middle East conflict, fuel costs weigh on bookings outlook
items.title_zh: 由于中东冲突、燃油成本影响预订前景，易捷航空股价下跌
items.desc_en: EasyJet said it took on roughly £25 million in additional fuel costs in the first half of 2026 due to the Middle East conflict.
items.desc_zh: 易捷航空表示，由于中东冲突，2026 年上半年该公司承担了约 2500 万英镑的额外燃油成本。

items.title_en: Kering looks to double profits as it unveils ambitious turnaround plan to revive Gucci
items.title_zh: 开云集团公布复兴古驰 (Gucci) 雄心勃勃的扭亏为盈计划，希望利润翻倍
items.desc_en: The "ReconKering" strategy announced Thursday includes more than doubling its 2025 recurring operating margin of 11.1%.
items.desc_zh: 周四宣布的“ReconKering”战略包括将其 2025 年经常性营业利润率提高一倍以上，即 11.1%。

items.title_en: Meghan says she was 'most trolled person in the world'
items.title_zh: 梅根称她是“世界上最受恶搞的人”
items.desc_en: Alongside her husband, the Duchess of Sussex was speaking to young people in Melbourne about the harms of social media.
items.desc_zh: 苏塞克斯公爵夫人与她的丈夫一起向墨尔本的年轻人讲述社交媒体的危害。

items.title_en: Hong Kong to announce tax break to lure global commodity traders
items.title_zh: 香港宣布减税以吸引全球大宗商品贸易商
items.desc_en: Hong Kong is rolling out a new tax break for commodity traders as it seeks to strengthen its position as a regional trading hub and revive shipping activity amid global supply disruptions.
items.desc_zh: 香港正在为大宗商品贸易商推出新的税收减免政策，以期加强其作为区域贸易中心的地位，并在全球供应中断的情况下重振航运活动。

items.title_en: Don't call time on dollar dominance just yet, say analysts as 'petroyuan' call sparks debate
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，暂时不要宣布美元主导地位结束，因为“石油人民币”的呼吁引发了争论
items.desc_en: The dollar index, which tracks its performance against a basket of major currencies, fell almost 10% through 2025.
items.desc_zh: 追踪一揽子主要货币表现的美元指数到 2025 年下跌近 10%。

items.title_en: China's economy grows faster than expected despite Iran war
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗战争，中国经济增长仍快于预期
items.desc_en: The better-than-expected GDP data comes as Asian countries have been hit hard by the impact of the conflict.
items.desc_zh: GDP数据好于预期之际，亚洲国家正受到冲突影响的严重打击。

items.title_en: TSMC first-quarter profit rises 58%, beats estimates as AI demand fuels record run
items.title_zh: 台积电第一季度利润增长 58%，超出预期，人工智能需求推动创纪录增长
items.desc_en: TSMC reported another quarter of record profit, with the company expecting AI demand to continue to grow.
items.desc_zh: 台积电公布季度利润再创新高，该公司预计人工智能需求将继续增长。

items.title_en: Israeli demolitions levelling towns in south Lebanon, satellite images show
items.title_zh: 卫星图像显示，以色列拆除了黎巴嫩南部的城镇
items.desc_en: BBC Verify analysis found more than 1,400 buildings had been destroyed since 2 March.
items.desc_zh: BBC verify 分析发现，自 3 月 2 日以来，已有 1,400 多座建筑物被毁。

items.title_en: Cool Hand Luke actress Joy Harmon dies aged 87
items.title_zh: 《酷手卢克》女演员乔伊·哈蒙去世，享年 87 岁
items.desc_en: Harmon was best known for a car-washing scene in the Paul Newman prison drama.
items.desc_zh: 哈蒙因保罗·纽曼监狱剧中的洗车场景而闻名。

items.title_en: Trump says Israel and Lebanon leaders to hold talks after first high-level meeting in decades
items.title_zh: 特朗普称以色列和黎巴嫩领导人将在几十年来首次高级别会议后举行会谈
items.desc_en: The U.S. president said he was "trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon."
items.desc_zh: 美国总统表示，他“试图在以色列和黎巴嫩之间获得一点喘息空间”。

items.desc_zh: 一位莎士比亚专家确定了剧作家 1613 年购买的房产的位置和面积。

items.title_zh: 澳大利亚炼油厂发生“史无前例”的火灾，影响国家汽油供应

items.desc_zh: 在全球紧缩的情况下，这场火灾加深了人们对美国石油供应的担忧。

items.title_zh: 前美国海军陆战队飞行员在澳大利亚引渡上诉中败诉

items.desc_zh: 丹尼尔·杜根 (Daniel Duggan) 因涉嫌在南非非法训练中国军队而于 2022 年被捕。

items.title_en: Epstein accusations fly in Senate after César Chávez Monument row
items.title_zh: 塞萨尔·查韦斯纪念碑事件引发爱泼斯坦指控

items.desc_zh: 参议员海因里希提议修改一项法案，暂时关闭该纪念碑，并要求政府审查一座新纪念碑，以纪念农场工人运动。

items.title_en: Spirit Airlines could liquidate as early as this week, sources say
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，精神航空最早可能于本周清算
items.desc_en: The carrier is facing the added challenge of a spike in the price of fuel. Fuel is airlines' biggest expense after labor.
items.desc_zh: 该航空公司还面临着燃油价格上涨的额外挑战。燃油是航空公司仅次于劳动力的最大开支。

items.title_en: Stock futures are little changed following a record-setting day for S&P 500 and Nasdaq: Live updates
items.title_zh: 在标准普尔 500 指数和纳斯达克指数创纪录的一天之后，股票期货几乎没有变化：实时更新

items.desc_zh: 随着交易员摆脱对中东冲突的担忧，标准普尔 500 指数和纳斯达克综合指数攀升至新高。

items.desc_en: Top executives from firms such as Meta and YouTube will be asked what they are doing to protect children.
items.desc_zh: Meta 和 YouTube 等公司的高管将被问到他们正在采取哪些措施来保护儿童。

items.title_zh: Lumen Technology 的高风险光纤投资几乎使其破产。现在，它正在为人工智能的未来提供动力

items.desc_zh: 周三，数百名亚马逊大型卖家抵制其广告平台，以抗议政策变化。

items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦著名囚犯马尔万·巴尔古提 (Marwan Barghouti) 一个月内遭到三次袭击，家人称
items.desc_en: The Israeli Prison Service says the allegation that Barghouti was subjected to physical violence by prison guards are "false and baseless".
